abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

materials: YarnArt JEANS (55% cotton, 45% Polyacrylic) Color No.: 29

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work ten single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for three rounds.
rounds.title: Rows 2-4

rounds.summary: Work four increases then six single crochets, totalling fourteen stitches.
rounds.title: Row 5

rounds.summary: Repeat (single crochet, increase) seven times, totalling twenty-one stitches.
rounds.title: Row 6

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for five rounds.
rounds.title: Rows 7-11

rounds.summary: Work two decreases then ten single crochets, totalling twelve stitches.
rounds.title: Row 12

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.rawInstruction: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.summary: Stuff the head portion before continuing.
rounds.title: Stuff

rounds.summary: Work a decrease then ten single crochets, totalling eleven stitches.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for seventy rounds.
rounds.title: Rows 14-83

rounds.summary: Work a decrease then nine single crochets, totalling ten stitches.
rounds.title: Row 84

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Row 85

rounds.summary: Work a decrease then eight single crochets, totalling nine stitches.
rounds.title: Row 86

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Row 87

rounds.summary: Work a decrease then seven single crochets, totalling eight stitches.
rounds.title: Row 88

rounds.rawInstruction: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire
rounds.summary: Insert a wire into the body for poseability, pre-bending the edges for safety.
rounds.title: Insert wire

rounds.summary: Work a decrease then six single crochets, totalling seven stitches.
rounds.title: Row 89

rounds.summary: Work a decrease then five single crochets, totalling six stitches.
rounds.title: Row 90

rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rounds.
rounds.title: Rows 91-92

rounds.summary: Close the remaining six loops to finish the tail.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops

rounds.rawInstruction: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.summary: Glue the safety eyes in place and embroider eyebrows above them.
rounds.title: Glue eyes and embroider eyebrows
